title: task.routed v1
description: Event emitted by the Brain service when it selects an agent for a task. Provides routing decision metadata for observability and audit.

type.description: Message type discriminator. Always 'task.routed' for this schema.

source.description: Bus identity of the Brain service agent that made the routing decision.

target.description: Bus channel this message is published to. Defaults to 'sos:channel:tasks'.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which this message was emitted.

version.description: Schema version of this message. SemVer — major.minor or major.minor.patch.

message_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this message instance. UUID v4 recommended.

trace_id.description: W3C Trace Context trace-id (32 hex chars). Optional; minted at ingress when absent.

payload.description: Data describing the Brain's routing decision for the task.

task_id.description: Identifier of the task that was routed. Alphanumeric, underscores, and dashes only.

routed_to.description: Agent name selected by the Brain to execute the task.

routed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the routing decision was made.

score.description: Confidence score of the routing decision (0.0 = lowest, 1.0 = highest).

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this agent was selected.

skill_matched.description: Skill identifier that matched the task's skill requirement, if applicable.

fallback.description: True if this was a fallback routing (primary agent unavailable). False for primary selection.
